emotion_detection.description: 多语言情绪关键词和回应模板，用于检测患者情绪变化并主动提供心理支持。供林美彤的情绪Tool使用。

mild.description: 轻微情绪波动，日常挫折感
mild.response_approach: 共情 + 轻度鼓励 + 实际建议

moderate.description: 持续的负面情绪，用药疲劳，焦虑
moderate.response_approach: 深度共情 + 具体支持策略 + 建议寻求帮助

severe.description: 严重心理困扰，绝望感，可能需要专业帮助
severe.response_approach: 紧急关怀 + 提供心理援助资源 + 建议立即寻求专业帮助

mild_frustration.cn: 我理解管理慢性病确实不容易，每天要注意很多事情。你已经做得很好了，每一小步都是进步。有什么我可以帮你的吗？
mild_frustration.en: I understand managing a chronic condition isn't easy — there's so much to keep track of every day. You're doing great, and every small step counts. How can I help?
mild_frustration.malay: Saya faham menguruskan penyakit kronik tidak mudah. Anda sudah buat dengan baik. Bagaimana saya boleh membantu?

medication_fatigue.cn: 吃药确实是件辛苦的事，特别是每天都要记得。但它在默默保护你的身体。要不要我帮你整理一下药物时间表，让服药变得更简单？
medication_fatigue.en: Taking medication every day can feel tiring, but it's quietly protecting your health. Would you like me to help organize your medication schedule to make it easier?
medication_fatigue.malay: Makan ubat setiap hari memang memenatkan, tapi ia melindungi kesihatan anda. Boleh saya bantu susun jadual ubat?

anxiety_about_condition.cn: 有这样的担忧是很正常的，很多慢性病患者都有同样的感受。新加坡有很好的医疗系统来帮助你。定期检查和按时服药是最好的保护。如果你感到非常焦虑，也可以和家人朋友聊聊，或者拨打心理援助热线。
anxiety_about_condition.en: It's completely natural to feel worried — many people managing chronic conditions feel the same way. Singapore has excellent healthcare to support you. Regular check-ups and taking your medication are the best protection. If you're feeling very anxious, talking to family or friends can help, or you can call a mental health helpline.
anxiety_about_condition.malay: Perasaan risau itu normal. Ramai pesakit kronik merasakan perkara yang sama. Sistem kesihatan Singapura sangat baik untuk membantu anda.

hopelessness.cn:
听到你这样说我很担心你。管理慢性病确实是一场长期的旅程，有时候会感到疲惫和灰心，这很正常。但请记住，你不是一个人在面对。如果你现在感到非常难受，请拨打：
- 心理援助热线：1800-221-4444（全天候）
- SOS热线：1767（24小时）
或者告诉你身边信任的人。
hopelessness.en:
I'm concerned about how you're feeling. Managing a chronic condition is a long journey, and it's okay to feel tired and discouraged sometimes. But please remember — you're not alone. If you're really struggling right now, please reach out:
- Mental Health Helpline: 1800-221-4444 (24/7)
- SOS: 1767 (24 hours)
Or talk to someone you trust.
hopelessness.malay:
Saya risau tentang perasaan anda. Jika anda memerlukan bantuan, sila hubungi:
- Talian Bantuan Kesihatan Mental: 1800-221-4444
- SOS: 1767

self_blame_about_diet.cn: 不要太自责了！偶尔放纵是人之常情，重要的是整体趋势而不是某一餐。明天又是新的一天，我们一起继续加油。要不要看看下一餐可以吃什么更健康的选择？
self_blame_about_diet.en: Don't be too hard on yourself! It's perfectly human to indulge once in a while. What matters is the overall trend, not one meal. Tomorrow is a new day — let's keep going together. Would you like to see some healthier options for your next meal?
self_blame_about_diet.malay: Jangan terlalu menyalahkan diri sendiri! Kadang-kadang nak makan sesuatu yang sedap itu biasa. Esok hari baru, kita teruskan bersama.

pain_or_discomfort.cn: 听到你不舒服我很关心。你现在的症状是什么？如果症状严重或持续，建议尽快就医。记录一下症状发生的时间和情况，这些信息对医生很有用。
pain_or_discomfort.en: I'm sorry to hear you're not feeling well. Can you describe your symptoms? If they're severe or persistent, please see a doctor soon. Try to note when the symptoms started and any triggers — this information will be helpful for your doctor.
pain_or_discomfort.malay: Saya dengar anda tidak sihat. Jika simptom teruk atau berterusan, sila berjumpa doktor.

encouragement_after_good_reading.cn: 做得好！你的{metric}在正常范围内。你的努力得到了回报，请继续保持！
encouragement_after_good_reading.en: Well done! Your {metric} is in the normal range. Your hard work is paying off — keep it up!
encouragement_after_good_reading.malay: Bagus! {metric} anda dalam julat normal. Teruskan usaha anda!

proactive_check_in_templates.description: 当系统检测到用户一段时间没有互动或健康指标有波动时，主动关怀

no_interaction_3days.cn: 嗨！好几天没有看到你的记录了，一切还好吗？记得按时吃药和测量哦。如果有什么困扰，随时告诉我。
no_interaction_3days.en: Hi! I haven't seen your records for a few days. Is everything okay? Remember to take your medication and check your vitals. If anything is bothering you, I'm here to listen.

after_bad_reading.cn: 我注意到你最近的{metric}有些波动。不用太担心，我们一起看看是什么原因。最近饮食或生活习惯有什么变化吗？
after_bad_reading.en: I noticed your recent {metric} readings have been fluctuating. Don't worry too much — let's figure out why together. Have there been any changes in your diet or routine recently?

medication_non_adherence.cn: 我注意到你最近几次药物提醒都没有确认。吃药确实不容易，有什么困难可以告诉我。如果是忘记了，我可以调整提醒时间。如果有其他原因，我们可以一起想办法。
medication_non_adherence.en: I've noticed you haven't confirmed your medication reminders recently. Taking medicine regularly isn't easy — tell me if there's a difficulty. If you're forgetting, I can adjust reminder times. If there's another reason, let's figure it out together.

singapore_mental_health_resources.name: Institute of Mental Health (IMH)
singapore_mental_health_resources.description: 新加坡国立精神健康机构

singapore_mental_health_resources.name: Samaritans of Singapore (SOS)
singapore_mental_health_resources.name_cn: 新加坡撒玛利亚人协会
